title: Bananarangs
description: This mod adds the upgradeable bananarang (banana boomerang), a fun, modular, vanilla-friendly weapon.
body:
![bananarang banner](https://i.imgur.com/S0EntBn.png) ## Description Welcome to Bananarangs! This mod adds bananarangs: a boomerang-banana hybrid. They can be thrown at enemies and come back to you when you throw them. ### There was a major bug with bananarang collision that affected Bananarangs 1.1 on 1.20-1.20.1. This has now been fixed with Bananarangs 1.2. ## Upgrades Bananarang upgrades can be crafted and applied at a bananarang anvil. 2 upgrades can be applied at a time and some upgrades are incompatible with others. 12 different upgrades are featured in this mod! (with more on the way!) ![bananarang upgrades](https://i.imgur.com/zVKqAiq.png) ### Bananarang anvil gui: ![bananarang anvil gui](https://i.imgur.com/KVQf9UT.gif) ### List of all upgrades: > **Damage Upgrade (3 tiers)** - increases damage by 1.5 hearts per level
**Power Upgrade (3 tiers)** - increases throwing power by 40% per level
**Flaming Upgrade** - lights enemies on fire
**Pickaxe Upgade** - attach a pickaxe with the anvil which enables block breaking. Levels of efficiency on the pickaxe increase the amount of blocks broken
**Sticky Upgrade** - items and mobs hit get stuck to the bananarang and return to the player - useful when combined with the pickaxe upgrade!
**Explosive Upgrade** - explodes on impact (bananarang isn't destroyed)
**Piercing Upgrade** - pierces through enemies and damage ignores armor (damage decreased by 50%)
**Fling Upgrade** - does extreme knockback
## Crafting Many crafting recipes require bananas, a new food item created when an apple is dyed yellow (better find some sunflowers)
> Banana:
![bananarang upgrades](https://i.imgur.com/IgRYOhR.png)
> Bananarang:
![bananarang upgrades](https://i.imgur.com/wuTyWLn.png)
> Bananarang Anvil:
![bananarang upgrades](https://i.imgur.com/Nt3WmUl.png)
You may use this mod in any modpack as long as you do not host the mod yourself and use download links from modrinth or curseforge. If you have any questions or want to report any bugs, feel free to leave a comment on this page. Enjoy Bananarangs!
